summary.intent: Add a reset filters button on the left side of the dashboard and make the 'art pipeline dashboard' heading clickable to reset filters when clicked.
summary.outcome: Modified the dashboard template to add the requested reset functionality in two locations: a button on the left side and click handler on the dashboard heading.

repo: ART dashboard uses OpenShift ImageStream triggers for automatic pod rollouts after builds
Build chain traversal uses BFS (breadth-first search) to find direct-linked runs including build-fbc-* runs

code.finding: Dashboard template supports filter reset functionality through clickable elements

workflow: Build-push workflow triggers automatic rollouts via ImageStream, taking ~30 seconds for new pods to become ready
Builds are numbered sequentially (build 14 mentioned) with associated commit hashes
